form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 9th of 23 at Curragh on March 28 over 1408m, 14 len behind Red Charlie with 63.5kg at $29. Previously second-up 5th of 17 at Leopardstown on March 30 2025 over 1609m, 2 len behind Dark Viper carrying 58.5kg at $17. Expecting him to kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign 21st of 23 at Curragh November 2 over 2414m, on heavy track; 55 len behind Switch From Diesel carrying 61kg at $51. form.formComment: Resuming after five-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign eighth of 22 at Curragh October 21 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 5.5 len behind Perry Mason carrying 60kg at $5. form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of ten weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign post a big 6 len win. Naas January 25 over 3721m in the wet defeating Peaceinthevalley carrying 73kg at $15. Previously first up; fourth of 17 at Leopardstown December 27 over 3218m, 8 len behind Bowensonfire with 65kg at $21. Could prove too smart for these.
